title: This News tab
body: You're looking at it -- a new News tab with a running feed of what's shipped, newest first. Click an entry to expand a short write-up. The red dot on the nav item clears once you visit.

title: BiS List now shows items in the right order
body: Your BiS List (on your profile and the officer's Roster view) was sometimes showing gear in a random order instead of head-to-toe. It now always sorts Head, Neck, Shoulder, Back, Chest, Wrist, Hands, Waist, Legs, Feet, Finger 1, Finger 2, Trinket 1, Trinket 2, Weapon, Off Hand.

title: Wishlist completeness indicator
body: Your Wishlist tab now shows "N/16 slots tagged" so you can see at a glance whether you've covered every gear slot -- it turns green once everything's covered and lists what's missing otherwise.

title: Wishlist tab reorganized into collapsible slot cards
body: The Wishlist tab used to be one long scroll. Each gear slot is now its own collapsible card with a colored dot showing how many items you've tagged there, and Other Sources (M+/Crafted) is now a single card instead of repeating on every slot.

title: My Wishlist: tag any item, not just your one BiS pick
body: Your profile now has a Wishlist tab where you can tag any item in your armor type as BiS, Good, OK, Catalyst Only, or Pass, with an optional note -- separate from (and shown alongside) the officer's single BiS pick per slot.

title: Meet the officers: new Bios tab
body: A new Bios tab introduces the team's raid officers -- photo, name, title, class/spec, and a short bio for each.

title: New History tab: past seasons at a glance
body: A new History tab lists every archived season, newest first, with the season's total Mythic kill count and the date of its last boss kill.

title: Search Recent Loot by item name
body: The landing page's Recent Loot feed now has a search box -- type an item name to see every match for the current season instead of just the last 10 drops.

title: Sign Up now shows and lets you edit your existing submission
body: Signing up when you've already submitted this season now shows your existing signup (status, class/spec, your note) with an Edit button instead of a blank form. Anything not yet added to the roster or denied can be corrected without asking an officer.
